LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-30-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS CORRECT/INTENDED TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR THE PARTIES TO JOINTLY PREPARE A CHART SHOWING IN THREE COLUMNS: (1) THE SPECIFIC TEXT THE CITY MOVES TO STRIKE; (2) THE CITY'S REASONS FOR STRIKING THAT TEXT AND (3) PLAINTIFFS' REASONS FOR NOT STRIKING THAT TEXT. AFTER THE CHART IS PREPARED AND FILED, THE CITY'S MOTION TO STRIKE MAY BE RE-SET FOR HEARING ON A MON.-THUR. AFTER NOVEMBER 27. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs'First Amended Complaint.

Matter discussed.

The Court determines that an incorrect tentative ruling was inadvertently posted on the Court's website for this matter. A copy of the correct/intended tentative ruling for this matter is provided to present counsel.

The Court adopts its correct/intended tentative ruling for this matter.

Matter is ordered off calendar for the parties to jointly prepare a chart showing in three columns: (1) the specific text the City moves to strike; (2) the City's reasons for striking that text and (3) plaintiffs' reasons for not striking that text. After the chart is prepared and filed, the City's motion to strike may be re-set for hearing on a Mon.-Thur. after November 27.
